title: Rikyo 50 Artificial Silk Carnation Flower Head with Stems Set,Vase Fillers,Marigold Flower Heads for Diwali Home Decor Day of The Dead Wreath Garland Cake Ornaments,5cm Petals Heads (Orange)
features: DIMENSIONS and Package Included -50 pcs x sized 2 inch Silk Carnation Flower Heads and 50 pcs x 8 inch Unattached Wired Stems.
Detachable & Flexible Stem: If you don't need to use the stem, it takes one second to remove the head from the stem. Also, the stem is very flexible!

Use for wedding decor, funeral work (unfortunately), homecoming, restaurant decor, home decor, floral arrangements, centerpiece arrangements, college game-day, flower walls, commercial projects, DYI projects, prom, and more!
Perfect for wedding, party, home decor, office decoration, coffee shop decor, etc. You can also use the flowers to make bride's bouquet, wedding centerpieces, Valentine's Day gift, etc.

Materials: The flowers are handmade, the flower heads are made of environmentally friendly silk,the flower rods are made of plastic. Let the flower stay beautiful forever, Single flower head. Silk Carnation Picks, Handmade Wrist Corsage, Artificial Flower Heads for Weddings, Decorations, DIY Decor.
description: Use for wedding decor, funeral work (unfortunately), homecoming, restaurant decor, home decor, college game-day, flower walls, commercial projects, DYI projects, prom, and more. DIY Flower Wrist Corsage Boutonniere. Tip: After a long time shipping, flowers may have a little deformation, with a hair dryer or hot steam can be restored.
